title: # OmniInteractionAccessConfig - Metadata API
description:
## Description

Represents configuration settings for access to Omnistudio FlexCard caching and data sources.

isAsyncCardCachingEnabled.description: If set to true, enables asynchronous FlexCard caching. The default is false.

isCardApexRemoteDisabled.description: If set to true, disables remote Apex method calls for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardCacheDisabled.description: If set to true, disables FlexCard caching. The default is false.

isCardDataTfrmDisabled.description: If set to true, disables Data Mapper data sources for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardIntegrationProcDisabled.description: If set to true, disables Integration Procedure data sources for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardRestApiDisabled.description: If set to true, disables REST calls for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardSoqlDisabled.description: If set to true, disables SOQL queries for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardSoslDisabled.description: If set to true, disables SOSL queries for FlexCards. The default is false.

isCardStreamingApiDisabled.description: If set to true, disables Streaming API calls for FlexCards. The default is false.

isDataTfrmEncrpFieldsDisabled.description: If set to true, disables Data Mapper field encryption for FlexCards. The default is false.

masterLabel.description: The name of the setting. The value is Profile_ProfileId, User_UserId, or Org_Wide.

setupOwner.description: The ID of the profile, user, or org to which the settings apply.
